examples:
Command Example
#
!xdr-xql-process-causality-network-activity-query endpoint_id=1234,2345 process_causality_id=<process_causality_id> limit=1 time_frame="1 month"
Human Readable Output
#
General Results
#
Execution Id

!xdr-xql-process-causality-network-activity-query endpoint_id=1234,2345 process_causality_id=<process_causality_id> limit=1 time_frame="1 month"
Human Readable Output
#
General Results
#
Execution Id
Number Of Results
Query

outputs.description: The given name of the query. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.execution_id An integer representing a unique ID of a successful XQL query execution. The execution_id value can be passed to the xdr-xql-get-query-results command.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.query_name

outputs.description: String representing the status of the API call; SUCCESS, FAIL, or PENDING. For multi-tenant queries, PARTIAL_SUCCESS means that at least one tenant failed to execute the query. Only partial results are available. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.number_of_results
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.status

outputs.description: Integer representing the number of results returned. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.query_cost Floating number representing the number of query units collected for this API. For example, {"local_tenant_id": 0.01}.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.remaining_quota Floating number representing the number of query units available for you to use. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.agent_hostname
outputs.name: For multi-tenant queries, the field displays a value per child tenant. For example, {"tenant_id_1": 0.01, "tenant_id_2": 2.3}.

outputs.description: The agent host name. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.agent_ip_addresses The agent IP addresses.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: List of application IDs action. Actual activities that took place and recorded by the agent. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.action_total_download Total downloads.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.action_app_id_transitions

outputs.description: The action as data. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.actor_process_image_sha256 The SHA256 value of the initiator.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.action_as_data

outputs.description: The name of the process that initiated the activity. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.actor_process_image_path Path of the initiating process.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.actor_process_image_name

outputs.description: Initiator instance ID. PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results._vendor The result vendor.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXQL.ProcessCausalityNetworkActivity.results.actor_process_instance_id
